ModMetaData.name: Masterwork Resonance
ModMetaData.author: aveasura
ModMetaData.description:
Masterwork and legendary weapons, apparel and armor can awaken random resonance when created.
Masterwork items have a 40% chance to awaken resonance. Legendary items have an 80% chance to awaken resonance.
Supports RimWorld 1.5 and 1.6. Includes Russian and English localization. Multiplayer-friendly: crafted resonance rolls use deterministic random generation.
Raid Evolution compatibility: if Raid Evolution is loaded and its Masterwork Resonance integration is enabled, Masterwork Resonance raider quality, raider resonance and raider biocode options are disabled/ignored. Raider resonance is then applied by Raid Evolution at the end of raid generation. The raider resonance chance multiplier in Masterwork Resonance remains active and is used by Raid Evolution.
